title: Vanilla, But Better (VBB)
description: Modpack that stays true to vanilla.
body:
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dad54de2cdd08c48bffefd3e18405c34675ce281.png)
## A true vanilla+?

Most kitchen-sink modpacks add so much content that the game barely feels like Minecraft anymore. New ores, new dimensions, new tech trees… it gets overwhelming fast.

_This modpack takes a different approach_

My goal is simple:
- ✔️ Keep Minecraft feeling like Minecraft
- ✔️ Add depth, discovery, and atmosphere
- ✔️ Enhance the experience without replacing it

If you love playing vanilla but wish it had a few more milestones, richer exploration, better atmosphere, and smoother quality-of-life features, I made this pack for you.

### 🏆 Achievements
Content-rich datapacks that enhances the experience.
- ✨ [BlazeandCave's Advancements Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blazeandcaves-advancements-pack)
- ✨ [Mob Heads](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mob-heads)
- ✨ [Music Disc Advancements](https://modrinth.com/datapack/music-disc-advancements)

### 🗺️ Adventure 

Explore upgraded worlds that stay true to the style of the original game. No realistic terrain or structures, just a vibrant world.

- 🌄 [CliffTree](https://modrinth.com/datapack/clifftree), [Incendium with IBO](https://modrinth.com/datapack/incendium), & [Nullscape](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nullscape)
- 🏛️ [All of DnT's](https://modrinth.com/user/NovaWostra)
- 🐉 [True Ending](https://modrinth.com/datapack/true-ending)

### 🌸 Immersion

Relax with subtle visuals, atmospheric audio, and new music that enhance the mood while you explore.

- 🎨 [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/user/kavast)
- 🍃 [Fresh Animation](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) & [Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items)
- 🎵 [Ambient Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds), [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps), & [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered)

### ⚙️ Quality of Life

Convenience that makes sense, without destroying gameplay.

- 🪨 [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/sswaystones)
- 🐎 [Call Your Mounts By Jodek](https://modrinth.com/user/Jodek)
- 🔊 [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)
- 📦 [Chest Tracker](https://modrinth.com/mod/chest-tracker-port)

### ⚡ Performance

Hand-picked optimization mods for a smoother, more stable experience.

- 💡 [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) & [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- 🗺 [C2ME](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) & [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- 🧬 [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) & [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)
- ⛰️ [Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium)
  
_..and more...way more_

### 👥 Best parts? 
- You can run your own server with the provided [server files](https://1drv.ms/u/c/d50b194b4f609695/IQAr88TeUoaKSp51NWhmlabZAY_mJjnc4_8MiRHltQ4uwo8?e=w4nzHO) with vanilla clients and bedrock compatibility.

If you want to read the gameplay changes, check it out [here](https://github.com/jkremulta/vanilla-but-better#welcome-to-vbb).
